leadText: The Big Root (Japanese: おおきなねっこ Big Root) is a type of held item introduced in Generation IV.

sections.title: Effect
sections.text: Effect [ edit | edit source ] If a Pokémon holding a Big Root uses a draining move or Strength Sap , it restores 30% more HP than it otherwise would. Additionally, a Pokémon holding a Big Root regains 30% more HP from Leech Seed , Ingrain and Aqua Ring . In Generation V onwards, the factor is 5324/4096. The Big Root also increases the damage taken by the holder from Liquid Ooze . Moves affected [ edit | edit source ] Move Type Category Absorb Grass Special Aqua Ring Water Status Bitter Blade Fire Physical Drain Punch Fighting Physical Draining Kiss Fairy Special Dream Eater Psychic Special Giga Drain Grass Special Horn Leech Grass Physical Ingrain Grass Status Leech Life Bug Physical Leech Seed Grass Status Matcha Gotcha Grass Special Mega Drain Grass Special Oblivion Wing Flying Special Parabolic Charge Electric Special Strength Sap Grass Status

sections.title: Description
sections.text: Description [ edit | edit source ] Games Description D P Pt A Pokémon hold item that boosts the power of HP-stealing moves to let the holder recover more HP. HG SS B W B2 W2 A Pokémon held item that boosts the power of HP-stealing moves to let the holder recover more HP. X Y OR AS An item to be held by a Pokémon. It boosts the power of HP-stealing moves so the holder recovers more HP. S M US UM P E An item to be held by a Pokémon. It boosts the amount of HP the holder recovers from HP-stealing moves. Sw Sh BD SP LA An item to be held by a Pokémon. It boosts the amount of HP the holder restores from HP-stealing moves. S V ZA An item to be held by a Pokémon. This root boosts the amount of HP the holder restores to itself when it uses HP-stealing moves.
